backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the college bus tracking app, defining user/driver/location types and registration logic for admin, driver, and traveller roles with access control enforcement.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the registration flow fix (admin/driver/traveller) to the relevant frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing fixes and functionality for each component, hook, page, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point with no external script dependencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing between login, register, and role-based dashboards, using a manualNavRef flag to prevent auto-routing from overriding post-registration navigation.
frontend/src/components/BusMap.tsx: Canvas-based bus map component that renders a simulated road grid and animates a bus marker with smooth interpolation toward updated GPS coordinates.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with the current year and app name.
frontend/src/components/GoogleBusMap.tsx: Empty file, likely a placeholder or removed Google Maps implementation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header component showing the app logo, authenticated user profile dropdown with role-based dashboard links, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a profile setup modal component.
frontend/src/components/ProximityAlertBa: A React banner component that displays an animated proximity alert when a bus is within 500m of the user, showing distance and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) cases and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for React, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile management, driver/traveller registration, and admin operations, with error normalization.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/useGeolocation.ts: A React hook that watches the browser's Geolocation API and returns the current coordinates, loading state, error message, and permission-denied flag.
frontend/src/lib/useProximityAlarm.ts: A React hook that computes the haversine distance between bus and traveller coordinates, triggers a one-time audio beep alarm when the bus enters a configurable threshold (default 500m), and exposes alarm state and a dismiss function.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays stats and tabbed tables of all drivers and travellers, with the ability to deactivate users via the backend.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page that allows drivers to toggle GPS location sharing, simulates bus movement updates every 3 seconds, and handles driver registration with bus number validation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Empty home page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing a styled card with a sign-in button and a link to the registration page.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page with tabbed forms for registering as an admin, driver, or traveller, including bus number validation and navigation to the appropriate dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/TravellerDashboard.ts: Traveller dashboard that lets users track a bus by number, displays its live location on a map, and triggers a proximity alarm when the bus is within 500 metres of the traveller.
frontend/src/utils/backendErrors.ts: Utility function that normalizes various backend error types (Error objects, strings, plain objects) into user-friendly message strings.
frontend/src/utils/haversineDistance.ts: Utility function that computes the distance in metres between two GPS coordinates using the Haversine formula.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with oklch-based design tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a traveller dashboard app, recording a known broken user registration issue and a single existing feature request to investigate and fix the registration flow for all user roles.
